text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That felt like a good time to me. My legs are
really moving today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You betcha-bet! And it's all thanks to you,
Trainer. ♪
choice_data_list: Nope, this is down to your efforts.
Nope, this is down to your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh! Well, yeah, I'm the one doing all the
running. But you do so much too...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Man, this sucks. It's always right when we're
winding down that my engines start heating up...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What? No way! I wouldn't want to keep you out.
It's already getting late.
choice_data_list: We should strike while the engine's hot!
We should strike when the engine's hot!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, but you said it—not me, remember?
Don't go regretting this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Trainer. You sure you're good with our
training session being this early?
choice_data_list: Well, you've got work in the evening, right?
Well, you've got work in the evening, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: So let's get some running in now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Remember all that? You've been matching my
energy this whole time we've been together,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I think that's been a really big help!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I'm really grateful. You're always
thinking about what's best for me.
choice_data_list: Let's say these results belong to both of us.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez. You always act so humble! But I guess...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If these results belong to both of us, then that
means this happiness does too, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie, then. Hehe, I like that idea.
